title: Badgers digg sushi
relevance_summary: Liquidity provider fee snatching via missing bridge setup

prevention.rule: Block any tx that attempts to sell fees without a bridge setup.

red_flags: Missing bridge setup for non-ETH pairs
High slippage due to lack of liquidity
summary: An attacker exploited a missing bridge setup in SushiMaker to claim fees that should have gone to xSUSHI holders. A bridge was later set up to prevent similar incidents.
